title.v: Kiểm tra đối chiếu số liệu

action.text:
declare @c char(1), @ngay_ct smalldatetime, @q nvarchar(4000), @year char(4), @stt_rec char(13) select @stt_rec = replace(stt_rec, '''', ''), @year = year(ngay_ct), @ngay_ct = ngay_ct from kkyc where so_ct = @so_ct
select @q = 'delete kkktdcsl from kkktdcsl a' select @q = @q + ' where not exists(select 1 from kkss$' + @year + ' b where b.stt_rec = ''' + @stt_rec + ''' and a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec and a.ma_kho = b.ma_kho and a.ma_vt = b.ma_vt and a.ma_vi_tri = b.ma_vi_tri and a.ma_lo = b.ma_lo)' select @q = @q + ' and not exists(select 1 from kktt$' + @year + ' c where c.stt_rec = ''' + @stt_rec + ''' and a.stt_rec = c.stt_rec and a.ma_kho = c.ma_kho and a.ma_vt = c.ma_vt and a.ma_vi_tri = c.ma_vi_tri and a.ma_lo = c.ma_lo)' select @q = @q + ' and a.stt_rec = ''' + @stt_rec + '''' exec sp_executesql @q
select @c = ',' select a.id, a.data as stt_rec, b.data as ma_vt, c.data as ma_kho, d.data as ma_vi_tri, e.data as ma_lo, f.data as isinsert into #t from dbo.FastBusiness$Function$System$Split(@n0, @c) a join dbo.fastbusiness$function$system$split(@n1, @c) b on a.id = b.id join dbo.FastBusiness$Function$System$Split(@n2, @c) c on a.id = c.id join dbo.FastBusiness$Function$System$Split(@n3, @c) d on a.id = d.id join dbo.FastBusiness$Function$System$Split(@n4, @c) e on a.id = e.id join dbo.FastBusiness$Function$System$Split(@n5, @c) f on a.id = f.id
delete kkktdcsl from kkktdcsl a with(nolock) join #t b on a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec and a.ma_vt = b.ma_vt and a.ma_kho = b.ma_kho and a.ma_vi_tri = b.ma_vi_tri and a.ma_lo = b.ma_lo where b.isInsert = 'false'
insert into kkktdcsl(stt_rec, ma_kho, ma_vi_tri, ma_vt, ma_lo) select stt_rec, ma_kho, ma_vi_tri, ma_vt, ma_lo from #t where isInsert = 'true'
select @so_lan as result return
